messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?

Please turn this below line into more prompt suitable for LLM like you {not more than one line}:
"Suggest phrases for more clarity"

"Suggest something for Enhancing my writing style with few examples"
"Improve my writing style by providing stylistic suggestions and examples."

“assistance with word choice”

"Provide suggestions with example for sentence structure"
"Offer sentence structure suggestions along with examples."
